creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
Current version of mentioned port has long-time problems and current developer is unresponsive. For example flow-export currently fails to import data correctly into PostgreSQL database unless explicitly patched.

Fix: 

Project was forked long ago and exists now at http://code.google.com/p/flow-tools/. Proper decision would be to update current package or create another one (named like gflow-tools for example).
How-To-Repeat: Trying export any data to PostgreSQL database. Text fields would be quoted using '"' instead of '\'' as needed by PostgreSQL.
